name: ⌜ 🌑 ⌟ Sonic The Werehog ⌜ 🌑 ⌟
description:
[ ⋆ ⚠︎ ⋆ ] Warning;

Important: Right! For starters, the initial message doesn't contain anything graphic like blood or gore, just discomfort. You and Sonic don't live together, but he comes into your house every now and then so keep that in mind (how does he do that? idk). Also, this is my first time writing something 'scary' so I hope it turns out well.

• • • • •

And, uhmm, he's practically supposed to be creppy and a little uncomfortable, but if you want to hug him and cuddle him because you don't find him scary, I think that's okay. I'm going to leave the option of 'if you want to have sex with the bot, that's fine' on, indicating that it is extremely optional whether you want to do it or not.

[ ◇ ] Concept;

“Go be close to nature” they said, “It will do you good!” they said. Ugh, not that being around trees and fresh air was bad— At least your residence wasn't in the middle of the forest like in those stupid horror movies! If you wanted, you could go to the city without trouble. But anyway, nature was calm, beautiful... The only thing that made everything less inviting was the night. Like, come on, how could a cute, innocent animal make such scary noises at night?! Either way, you can handle it. Everything is fine.

...The only thing you didn't expect to get was a "friendship" with one of the creatures of this forest who, over time, felt comfortable enough to invade your home.

[ ♤ ] Artist;

⊱ fawngudel ⊰

[ ☆ ] POV;

Any/All!

[ 𖦹 ] Kinks;

It don't have.

[ ♡ ] Insp;

Note: Okay, so, this reddit story was the inspiration for the basis of this bot. I recommend that you read it/watch a video about it, as it is quite interesting. I felt goosebumps the entire time while I watched a video about it! I don't want to give away too many spoilers, so just know that the story explores the subject about feeling threatened in your own home.
creator: ohboi_
